languages.text: Ценой многих смертей, оборона {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g} была прорвана. По завершении артиллерийской подготовки, к искалеченной взрывами поверхности планеты направились несколько шаттлов, отделившихся от флагмана. Небольшие, маневренные суда как нельзя лучше отвечали замыслу мое{mf|го|й} наследни{mf|ка|цы} — незаметно проникнуть в самое сердце древней гробницы и забрать то, что принадлежит {mf|ему|ей} по праву рождения.

traits.locale_text: Ценой многих смертей, оборона {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g} была прорвана. По завершении артиллерийской подготовки, к искалеченной взрывами поверхности планеты направились несколько шаттлов, отделившихся от флагмана. Небольшие, маневренные суда как нельзя лучше отвечали замыслу мое{mf|го|й} наследни{mf|ка|цы} — незаметно проникнуть в самое сердце древней гробницы и забрать то, что принадлежит {mf|ему|ей} по праву рождения.

languages.text: At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s defences were breached. Once the artillery finished, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the planet's blast-cratered surface. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.
languages.original_text: Ценой многих смертей, оборона {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g} была прорвана. По завершении артиллерийской подготовки, к искалеченной взрывами поверхности планеты направились несколько шаттлов, отделившихся от флагмана. Небольшие, маневренные суда как нельзя лучше отвечали замыслу мое{mf|го|й} наследни{mf|ка|цы} — незаметно проникнуть в самое сердце древней гробницы и забрать то, что принадлежит {mf|ему|ей} по праву рождения.

traits.locale_text: At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos'{/g} defences were breached. Once the artillery finished its preliminary work, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the blast-cratered surface of the planet. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s defences were breached. Once the artillery finished, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the planet's blast-cratered surface. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

Amidst the maelstrom of the raging battle, no one noticed several shuttles breaking off from the flagship. The small, manoeuvrable vessels were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos'{/g} defences were breached. Once the artillery finished its preliminary work, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the blast-cratered surface of the planet. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s defences were breached. Once the artillery finished, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the planet's blast-cratered surface. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

languages.text: 付出大量生命代价后，我们终于突破了{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}的防线。炮击结束，数艘穿梭机脱离旗舰，朝满是弹坑的行星地表飞去。这些小巧灵活的飞行器正适合执行我继承人的计划：潜入这座古老墓穴的核心，夺回本属于{mf|他|她}的财产。
languages.original_text: At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s defences were breached. Once the artillery finished, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the planet's blast-cratered surface. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

traits.locale_text: 付出大量生命代价后，我们终于突破了{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}的防线。炮击结束，数艘穿梭机脱离旗舰，朝满是弹坑的行星地表飞去。这些小巧灵活的飞行器正适合执行我继承人的计划：潜入这座古老墓穴的核心，夺回本属于{mf|他|她}的财产。

languages.text: Al precio de muchas vidas, las defensas de los {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} fueron atravesadas. Cuando la artillería terminó, varias lanzaderas partieron desde la nave insignia hacia la superficie llena de cráteres. Las naves, pequeñas y maniobrables, eran ideales para el plan de mi hereder{mf|o|a} de infiltrarse en el corazón de la antigua tumba para recuperar lo que le pertenecía por derecho.
languages.original_text: At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s defences were breached. Once the artillery finished, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the planet's blast-cratered surface. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

traits.locale_text: Al precio de muchas vidas, las defensas de los {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} fueron atravesadas. Cuando la artillería terminó, varias lanzaderas partieron desde la nave insignia hacia la superficie llena de cráteres. Las naves, pequeñas y maniobrables, eran ideales para el plan de mi hereder{mf|o|a} de infiltrarse en el corazón de la antigua tumba para recuperar lo que le pertenecía por derecho.

languages.text: Les défenses des {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} furent percées au prix de nombreuses vies. Lorsque les batteries d'artillerie se turent, plusieurs navettes se détachèrent du vaisseau amiral et se dirigèrent vers la surface criblée de cratères de la planète. Ces vaisseaux maniables de taille réduite étaient parfaitement adaptés au plan de {mf|mon héritier|mon héritière} : s'infiltrer au cœur du tombeau pour s'emparer de ce qui lui revenait de droit.
languages.original_text: At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s defences were breached. Once the artillery finished, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the planet's blast-cratered surface. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

traits.locale_text: Les défenses des {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} furent percées au prix de nombreuses vies. Lorsque les batteries d'artillerie se turent, plusieurs navettes se détachèrent du vaisseau amiral et se dirigèrent vers la surface criblée de cratères de la planète. Ces vaisseaux maniables de taille réduite étaient parfaitement adaptés au plan de {mf|mon héritier|mon héritière} : s'infiltrer au cœur du tombeau pour s'emparer de ce qui lui revenait de droit.

languages.text: Birçok can pahasına {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} savunması aşıldı. Topçuların işi bittiğinde sancak gemisinden birkaç mekik ayrılarak gezegenin krater dolu yüzeyine doğru yöneldi. Küçük, manevra kabiliyeti yüksek gemiler; vârisimin kadim mezarın yüreğine gizlice sızma ve doğuştan hakkı olan şeyi alma planına mükemmel şekilde uyuyordu.
languages.original_text: At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s defences were breached. Once the artillery finished, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the planet's blast-cratered surface. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

traits.locale_text: Birçok can pahasına {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} savunması aşıldı. Topçuların işi bittiğinde sancak gemisinden birkaç mekik ayrılarak gezegenin krater dolu yüzeyine doğru yöneldi. Küçük, manevra kabiliyeti yüksek gemiler; vârisimin kadim mezarın yüreğine gizlice sızma ve doğuştan hakkı olan şeyi alma planına mükemmel şekilde uyuyordu.

languages.text: Auf Kosten vieler Leben wurde die Verteidigung der {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} durchbrochen. Als die Artillerie das Feuer einstellte, legten mehrere Shuttles vom Flaggschiff ab und nahmen Kurs auf die von Einschüssen gezeichnete Oberfläche des Planeten. Das kleine und wendige Schiff war wie geschaffen für den Plan {mf|meines Erben|meiner Erbin}, unbemerkt in das Herz des alten Grabes einzudringen, um dort {mf|sein|ihr} Geburtsrecht einzufordern.
languages.original_text: At the cost of many lives, the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s defences were breached. Once the artillery finished, several shuttles broke off from the flagship and headed toward the planet's blast-cratered surface. The small, manoeuvrable craft were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

traits.locale_text: Auf Kosten vieler Leben wurde die Verteidigung der {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} durchbrochen. Als die Artillerie das Feuer einstellte, legten mehrere Shuttles vom Flaggschiff ab und nahmen Kurs auf die von Einschüssen gezeichnete Oberfläche des Planeten. Das kleine und wendige Schiff war wie geschaffen für den Plan {mf|meines Erben|meiner Erbin}, unbemerkt in das Herz des alten Grabes einzudringen, um dort {mf|sein|ihr} Geburtsrecht einzufordern.

languages.text: 激戦の渦の中、旗艦から数隻の輸送船が離脱したことに誰も気づかなかった。小さな機動力のある輸送船は、私の後継者の計画にぴったりだった。古代の墓の心臓部を潜り込み、{mf|彼の|彼女の}生まれつきのものをもらう計画だ。
languages.original_text: Amidst the maelstrom of the raging battle, no one noticed several shuttles breaking off from the flagship. The small, manoeuvrable vessels were perfectly suited to my heir's plan to stealthily penetrate the heart of the ancient tomb and take that which was {mf|his|her} birthright.

traits.locale_text: 激戦の渦の中、旗艦から数隻の輸送船が離脱したことに誰も気づかなかった。小さな機動力のある輸送船は、私の後継者の計画にぴったりだった。古代の墓の心臓部を潜り込み、{mf|彼の|彼女の}生まれつきのものをもらう計画だ。
